when_to_use: Accepting BLIK payments for Polish e-commerce merchants
Bank transfer checkout via 165 Polish banks via REST API

review.verdict: The default for Polish checkout given BLIK and bank coverage, though scope ends at the border.
review.best_for: Merchants serving Poland needing BLIK and broad local bank coverage
review.not_for: International teams needing pan-EU unified acquiring
